rationale: No qualitative change affecting Poland directly; Iran deal uncertainty continues to influence energy price outlook, but no new breakthrough confirmed.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump claims Sunday signing, Tehran disputes
top_events.summary: A confirmed Iran nuclear/sanctions deal could ease global oil supply and lower energy prices for Polish households, but Tehran's denial keeps uncertainty alive.

top_events.title: UK seizes Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: UK boarding a Russian shadow fleet vessel tightens enforcement of sanctions Poland supports, with minor indirect effect on regional energy supply chains.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: Ongoing US federal AI policy action has negligible direct impact on daily life in Poland; continuation of background tech-policy noise.
